title: Immersive Create+
description: A lightweight modpack based around the Create mod.
body:
This is a lightweight modpack that is based around the Create mod, while being more immersive with extra ambient sounds and effects using the overhauled sound system.

This modpack is for SMP servers that want to play with the Create mod and extras.

The modpack includes:
- Create mod with add-ons like Create enchantment,  things and misc, bells & whistles and more
- Includes optimisation mods like Lithium, EntityCulling and ImmediatlyFast to ensure the best performance
- Immersion mods like Distant Horizons, AmbientSounds and Sound Physics Remastered
- Sodium and included shaders
- MineColonies to start your own towns
- Voice Chat and Bluemap (live 3D map) to improve community engagement
- Some smaller mods to add some extra content and fun
